## What's new in v0.5.64

- Family members now see each other's key listings in the assistant's
  prompt ŌĆö shared keys gated by the family graph (any edge counts,
  including childŌåÆparent direction), private keys gated by the strict
  peer-edge as before.
- Listings respect per-record tag-ACL: a key name is shown only if
  the viewing actor would actually be allowed to read it.
- Backend bumped to 0.2.9.
- Bug fixes.
